io.projectExists: The selected folder already contains an atelier project.
io.createFolderFailed: Project folder could not be created. Check the path and write permissions.
io.readFolderFailed: Folder could not be read. Check whether the path still exists.
io.noProjectFound: No atelier project found (pack.atelier is missing in this folder).
io.saveFailed: Project could not be saved. Check disk space and write permissions.

migration.noProjectObject: pack.atelier does not contain a valid project object.
migration.newerVersion: The project was created with a newer atelier version (fgcloth v{{version}}). Please update atelier.

import.unsupportedFileType: File type is not supported (only YDD, YTD, YLD).
import.yldUnmatched: YLD could not be matched to a drawable.
import.normalSpecularNotVariant: Normal/Specular maps are not imported as a variant.
import.maxTextureVariants: Maximum of 26 texture variants per drawable (a–z).
import.duplicateSkipped: Duplicate — this mesh is already in the project.
import.noTexturesFound: No textures found — the drawable has no variant yet.
import.noMatchingYdd: No matching YDD file found in the import.
import.noSupportedFiles: No supported files (YDD, YTD, YLD) found

sidecar.pedBodyUnavailable: Ped body not available — set the GTA path in the settings
sidecar.buildBusy: A build is already running — please wait until it finishes.
sidecar.streamFailed: Sidecar stream could not be opened.
sidecar.progressLost: Connection to the build progress was lost.

menyoo.valuesClamped: Some values were outside the valid range and were adjusted.
menyoo.noPedWithProperties: The file contains no ped with PedProperties.
menyoo.notReadableXml: The file is not readable XML (Menyoo outfit or Spooner file expected).
menyoo.unknownXmlFormat: Unknown XML format (“{{root}}” instead of OutfitPedData/SpoonerPlacements).
menyoo.notFreemodePed: Not a freemode ped (ModelHash {{hash}}) — component indices may not match the preview.
menyoo.componentSlotUnreadable: Component slot “_{{index}}” is unreadable and is ignored.
menyoo.componentSlotOutOfRange: Component slot “_{{index}}”: value out of valid range — default is used.
menyoo.propSlotUnreadable: Prop slot “_{{index}}” is unreadable and is ignored.
menyoo.propSlotUnsupported: Prop slot “_{{index}}” is not supported and is ignored.
menyoo.propSlotOutOfRange: Prop slot “_{{index}}”: value out of valid range — is ignored.
menyoo.propSlotDuplicate: Prop slot “_{{index}}” is specified twice and is ignored.
